Name: Woodcutter
Description: Harvest timber from forests and sell lumber to carpenters and builders across the realm.

Name: Miner
Description: Delve into caves and quarries to extract ore, gems, and stone for crafting and trade.

Name: Herbalist
Description: Collect rare plants and herbs used in alchemy, medicine, and magical rituals.

Name: Blacksmith
Description: Forge weapons, armour, and tools from raw metals. Mastery unlocks rarer alloys and enchantable gear.

Name: Alchemist
Description: Brew potions, elixirs, and transmutation reagents from gathered herbs and minerals.

Name: Cook
Description: Prepare meals that grant temporary buffs to adventurers. Higher skill unlocks more powerful recipes.

Name: Leathersmith
Description: Work hides and pelts into supple armour, cloaks, and footwear for rogues and hunters.

Name: Tailor
Description: Weave cloth and sew robes worn by clerics, mages, and druids. Higher skill yields finer magical fabrics.

Name: Artificer
Description: Craft rings, bands, and trinkets that channel latent power. Mastery unlocks rarer gemstone settings.

Name: Enchanter
Description: Imbue staves, tomes, and magical weapons with arcane energy. A rare and sought-after craft.
